summary: Comprehensive testing of VMS360 Dashboard authentication system completed. All backend auth APIs (19/19 tests) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Admin/Operator role-based access control properly implemented.
passed_tests: Admin login with credentials admin/12345 - PASSED
Operator login with credentials operator/12345 - PASSED
Admin can access Users page and see all menu items (VMS, Stores, Cameras, Users, Settings) - PASSED
Operator cannot access admin-only pages (redirected to dashboard) - PASSED
Operator sidebar hides admin-only menu items - PASSED
User edit functionality - updating full_name works correctly - PASSED
User edit functionality - password update works (verified via backend test) - PASSED
Dashboard displays 6 stat cards with readable text in both themes - PASSED
Dashboard shows store cards with visitor data (Forum Kadikoy visible) - PASSED
User creation via Add User dialog - PASSED
User toggle active/inactive status - PASSED (backend test)
seed_data_creation: Default users (admin/operator) created automatically on startup with password 12345
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication system fully tested. Admin user: admin/12345, Operator user: operator/12345. Role-based access control working - operators cannot access /vms, /stores, /cameras, /users, /settings pages. User CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete, toggle) all working. Theme toggle functional. Dashboard displays real VMS data from Forum Kadikoy store.
